folio.label: 86r
folio.l: His spirit , god restored , of his grace
Vn to his body a ©ein , and he a woke
But natheles , for feer , ©et he quoke
So was the deueles ars , ay in his mynde
That is hise Eritage , of verrey kynde
God saue ©ow alle , saue this cursed Frere
My prologö wol I ende , in this manere
